Epic Goal: Allow users to securely access the app via Google or as a Guest, minimizing onboarding friction.
Collect the profile and preference data needed to personalize the fitness experience from first launch.
Calculate and present foundational health metrics (BMI, MHR, Training Zone) derived from onboarding data.
Classify users into one or more behavioral/fitness personas to drive personalization across the app.
Generate personalized, multi-option workout plans and surface one best recommendation per session.
Deliver voice- and text-based AI coaching that motivates, explains, and converses with the user at an adjustable talkativeness level.
Guide the user through an active workout with instructions, timers, pause/resume, and completion tracking.
Provide a home-screen summary of today's plan, XP, streaks, history, and progress.
Drive engagement and retention through XP, levels, streaks, and achievements.
Let users review completed workouts, historical data, and progress toward their fitness goal over time.
